'''âv-l-w''' ('''valawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calibrate|calibrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calibrate|calibrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| valawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:valawithi|valawithi]] || [[word:valawiji|valawiji]] || [[word:valawishi|valawishi]] || [[word:valawi|valawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:valawuthuth|valawuthuth]] || [[word:valawujuj|valawujuj]] || [[word:valawushush|valawushush]] || [[word:valaw|valaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:valawuthu|valawuthu]] || [[word:valawuju|valawuju]] || [[word:valawushu|valawushu]] || [[word:valawu|valawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:valawufuth|valawufuth]] || [[word:valawufuj|valawufuj]] || [[word:valawufush|valawufush]] || [[word:valawuf|valawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:valawethe|valawethe]] || [[word:valaweje|valaweje]] || [[word:valaweshe|valaweshe]] || [[word:valawe|valawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:valawothoth|valawothoth]] || [[word:valawojoj|valawojoj]] || [[word:valawoshosh|valawoshosh]] || [[word:valaw|valaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:valawotho|valawotho]] || [[word:valawojo|valawojo]] || [[word:valawosho|valawosho]] || [[word:valawo|valawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:valawofoth|valawofoth]] || [[word:valawofoj|valawofoj]] || [[word:valawofosh|valawofosh]] || [[word:valawof|valawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:valawĂŠthĂŠ|valawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:valawĂŠjĂŠ|valawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:valawĂŠshĂŠ|valawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:valawĂŠ|valawĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:valawathath|valawathath]] || [[word:valawajaj|valawajaj]] || [[word:valawashash|valawashash]] || [[word:valaw|valaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:valawatha|valawatha]] || [[word:valawaja|valawaja]] || [[word:valawasha|valawasha]] || [[word:valawa|valawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:valawafath|valawafath]] || [[word:valawafaj|valawafaj]] || [[word:valawafash|valawafash]] || [[word:valawaf|valawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:valawasha|valawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govalawasha|govalawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivalawasha|gokivalawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:valawnĂŒsha|valawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govalawnknĂŒsha|govalawnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivalawnĂŒsha|gokivalawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:valawshĂ«sha|valawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govalawnkshĂ«sha|govalawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivalawshĂ«sha|gokivalawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:valawrosha|valawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govalawnkrosha|govalawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivalawrosha|gokivalawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:valawmusha|valawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govalawnkmusha|govalawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalawmusha|gokivalawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:valawsherasha|valawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govalawnksherasha|govalawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivalawsherasha|gokivalawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:valawngasha|valawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govalawnkngasha|govalawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivalawngasha|gokivalawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:valawyasha|valawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govalawnkyasha|govalawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivalawyasha|gokivalawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:valawyamasha|valawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govalawnkyamasha|govalawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivalawyamasha|gokivalawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:valawnĂŒshĂ«sha|valawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govalawnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govalawnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivalawnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivalawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:valawnĂŒrosha|valawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govalawnknĂŒrosha|govalawnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivalawnĂŒrosha|gokivalawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valawnĂŒmusha|valawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govalawnknĂŒmusha|govalawnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalawnĂŒmusha|gokivalawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:valawshĂ«nĂŒsha|valawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govalawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govalawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivalawshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivalawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:valawshĂ«rosha|valawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govalawnkshĂ«rosha|govalawnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivalawshĂ«rosha|gokivalawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valawshĂ«musha|valawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govalawnkshĂ«musha|govalawnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalawshĂ«musha|gokivalawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:valawronĂŒsha|valawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govalawnkronĂŒsha|govalawnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivalawronĂŒsha|gokivalawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:valawroshĂ«sha|valawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govalawnkroshĂ«sha|govalawnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivalawroshĂ«sha|gokivalawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valawromusha|valawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govalawnkromusha|govalawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalawromusha|gokivalawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:valawmunĂŒsha|valawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govalawnkmunĂŒsha|govalawnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivalawmunĂŒsha|gokivalawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:valawmushĂ«sha|valawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govalawnkmushĂ«sha|govalawnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivalawmushĂ«sha|gokivalawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:valawmurosha|valawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govalawnkmurosha|govalawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivalawmurosha|gokivalawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:valaw|valaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠw|vĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovalaw|hovalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠlĂŠw|hovĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovalaw|hohovalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠlĂŠw|hohovĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvalaw|nĂŒvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠlĂŠw|nĂŒvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvalaw|nĂŒnĂŒvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠlĂŠw|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvalaw|nĂŻvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠlĂŠw|nĂŻvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvalaw|nĂŻnĂŻvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠlĂŠw|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvalaw|luvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠlĂŠw|luvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvalaw|luluvalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠlĂŠw|luluvĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livalaw|livalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠlĂŠw|livĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivalaw|lilivalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠlĂŠw|lilivĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovalaw|kovalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠlĂŠw|kovĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovalaw|kokovalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠlĂŠw|kokovĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevalaw|kevalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠlĂŠw|kevĂŠlĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevalaw|kekevalaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠlĂŠw|kekevĂŠlĂŠw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
